title: Stave Observation Contract v1
description: Contract schema for Stave observation snapshots. Each snapshot captures the configuration state of infrastructure resources at a single point in time.

schema_version.title: Schema Version
schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Accepted values allow forward-compatible ingestion of obs.v0.1 documents.

captured_at.title: Capture Timestamp
captured_at.description: UTC timestamp in RFC 3339 format indicating when the observation data was captured.

generated_by.title: Generator Metadata
generated_by.description: Metadata about the tool and provider that generated this observation.

source_type.title: Source Type
source_type.description: Source type identifier indicating the extraction method (e.g., terraform.plan_json, aws.config_api).

tool.title: Tool Name
tool.description: Name of the tool that produced this observation (e.g., stave-extract, custom-script).

tool_version.title: Tool Version
tool_version.description: Semantic version of the extraction tool.

provider.title: Provider Name
provider.description: Cloud or infrastructure provider name (e.g., aws, gcp, azure).

provider_version.title: Provider Version
provider_version.description: Version of the provider plugin or API used during extraction.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: List of infrastructure resources captured in this observation snapshot.

identities.title: Identities
identities.description: List of IAM identities captured in this observation snapshot.

sourceRef.title: Source Reference
sourceRef.description: Reference to the source file and line from which this element was extracted.

file.title: Source File Path
file.description: Path to the source file (e.g., Terraform config, API response cache).

line.title: Source Line Number
line.description: Line number in the source file where this element is defined.

resource.title: Observed Resource
resource.description: A single infrastructure resource and its configuration properties.

id.title: Resource ID
id.description: Unique identifier for this resource (e.g., ARN, resource name, or synthetic ID).

type.title: Resource Type
type.description: Resource type indicating the kind of infrastructure (e.g., storage_bucket, iam_role, k8s.clusterrolebinding). Lowercase letters, digits, '_', '.', and '-' only.

vendor.title: Resource Vendor
vendor.description: Cloud vendor or platform that provides this resource (e.g., aws, gcp, azure).

properties.title: Configuration Properties
properties.description: Resource configuration properties evaluated by control predicates. Intentionally flexible (any JSON object) to support diverse resource types without per-type schemas. Future versions may introduce typed sub-schemas keyed by resource type.

source.title: Source Reference
source.description: Optional reference to the source file and line for traceability.

identity.title: Observed Identity
identity.description: An IAM identity (user, role, service account) and its evaluated properties.

id.title: Identity ID
id.description: Unique identifier for this identity (e.g., ARN, email, principal ID).

type.title: Identity Type
type.description: Identity type indicating the kind of principal (e.g., iam_role, service_account, user). Lowercase letters, digits, '_', '.', and '-' only.

vendor.title: Identity Vendor
vendor.description: Cloud vendor or platform that manages this identity (e.g., aws, gcp, azure).

properties.title: Identity Properties
properties.description: Identity attributes evaluated by control predicates. Intentionally flexible (any JSON object).

source.title: Source Reference
source.description: Optional reference to the source file and line for traceability.
